provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality.name: provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality
provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality.description: The person provides proof that they hold Belgian nationality.

is_foreigner.name: is_foreigner
is_foreigner.description: The person is a foreigner because they do not provide proof of Belgian nationality.

is_citizen_of_union.name: is_citizen_of_union
is_citizen_of_union.description: The person is a citizen of the European Union.

falls_under_community_free_movement_law.name: falls_under_community_free_movement_law
falls_under_community_free_movement_law.description: The person falls under Community law on free movement as defined in Article 2, point 5, of the Schengen Borders Code.

is_third_country_national.name: is_third_country_national
is_third_country_national.description: The person is a national of a third country: not a Union citizen and not covered by Community free movement law.

present_on_territory.name: present_on_territory
present_on_territory.description: The person is present on the territory.

satisfies_conditions_for_access_or_resid.name: satisfies_conditions_for_access_or_residence
satisfies_conditions_for_access_or_resid.description: The person satisfies the conditions for access to or residence on the territory.

in_illegal_residence.name: in_illegal_residence
in_illegal_residence.description: The person is in illegal residence: present on the territory without satisfying access or residence conditions.

subject_to_removal_procedure.name: subject_to_removal_procedure
subject_to_removal_procedure.description: The foreigner is subject to a removal procedure.

subject_to_international_protection_proc.name: subject_to_international_protection_procedure
subject_to_international_protection_proc.description: The foreigner is subject to a procedure for granting international protection.

subject_to_dublin_transfer_procedure.name: subject_to_dublin_transfer_procedure
subject_to_dublin_transfer_procedure.description: The foreigner is subject to a procedure for determining or transferring to the Member State responsible for examining the application for international protection.

individual_examination_performed.name: individual_examination_performed
individual_examination_performed.description: An individual examination of the foreigner has been performed for the purpose of establishing a risk of absconding.

risk_of_absconding.name: risk_of_absconding
risk_of_absconding.description: A risk of absconding exists for the foreigner, established after individual examination and based on one or more objective criteria.

possesses_valid_travel_document.name: possesses_valid_travel_document
possesses_valid_travel_document.description: The foreigner is in possession of a valid travel document, passport, or identity document.

recognised_as_national_by_country_author.name: recognised_as_national_by_country_authority
recognised_as_national_by_country_author.description: The foreigner has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country, which has declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer.

falls_under_laissez_passer_nationality_c.name: falls_under_laissez_passer_nationality_category
falls_under_laissez_passer_nationality_c.description: The foreigner falls under the category of nationalities for which the minister may issue a laissez-passer directly.

is_identified_foreigner.name: is_identified_foreigner
is_identified_foreigner.description: The foreigner is identified: possesses valid travel/identity document, is recognised by national authority willing to issue laissez-passer, or falls under a direct laissez-passer nationality category.

did_not_submit_residence_application_aft.name: did_not_submit_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_during_illegal_residence
did_not_submit_residence_application_aft.description: The foreigner did not submit a residence application after illegal entry or during illegal residence.

did_not_submit_protection_application_wi.name: did_not_submit_protection_application_within_legal_period
did_not_submit_protection_application_wi.description: The foreigner did not submit an application for international protection within the period provided by law.

criterion_failure_to_apply_met.name: criterion_failure_to_apply_met
criterion_failure_to_apply_met.description: The absconding criterion based on failure to apply is met: the foreigner did not submit a residence or international protection application as required.

used_false_or_misleading_information.name: used_false_or_misleading_information
used_false_or_misleading_information.description: The foreigner used false or misleading information, false or falsified documents, committed fraud, or used other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

criterion_fraud_met.name: criterion_fraud_met
criterion_fraud_met.description: The absconding criterion based on fraud is met: the foreigner used false information, falsified documents, or other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

does_not_cooperate_with_authorities.name: does_not_cooperate_with_authorities
does_not_cooperate_with_authorities.description: The foreigner does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for access, residence, establishment, and removal regulations.

criterion_non_cooperation_met.name: criterion_non_cooperation_met
criterion_non_cooperation_met.description: The absconding criterion based on non-cooperation is met: the foreigner does not or has not cooperated with the relevant authorities.

non_compliant_with_transfer_refoulement_.name: non_compliant_with_transfer_refoulement_or_removal_measure
non_compliant_with_transfer_refoulement_.description: The foreigner has clearly indicated unwillingness or has already failed to comply with a transfer, refoulement, or removal measure.

non_compliant_with_entry_ban.name: non_compliant_with_entry_ban
non_compliant_with_entry_ban.description: The foreigner has clearly indicated unwillingness or has already failed to comply with an entry ban that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

non_compliant_with_less_coercive_measure.name: non_compliant_with_less_coercive_measure
non_compliant_with_less_coercive_measure.description: The foreigner has clearly indicated unwillingness or has already failed to comply with a less coercive measure aimed at guaranteeing transfer, refoulement, or removal.

non_compliant_with_freedom_restricting_m.name: non_compliant_with_freedom_restricting_measure_for_public_order
non_compliant_with_freedom_restricting_m.description: The foreigner has clearly indicated unwillingness or has already failed to comply with a freedom-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security.

non_compliant_with_equivalent_measure_by.name: non_compliant_with_equivalent_measure_by_other_member_state
non_compliant_with_equivalent_measure_by.description: The foreigner has clearly indicated unwillingness or has already failed to comply with a measure taken by another Member State equivalent to a transfer, refoulement, removal, entry ban, less coercive, or freedom-restricting measure.

criterion_non_compliance_with_measures_m.name: criterion_non_compliance_with_measures_met
criterion_non_compliance_with_measures_m.description: The absconding criterion based on non-compliance with measures is met: the foreigner has indicated unwillingness or has failed to comply with a relevant measure.

subject_to_active_entry_ban.name: subject_to_active_entry_ban
subject_to_active_entry_ban.description: The foreigner is subject to an entry ban in the Kingdom and/or in another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

criterion_entry_ban_met.name: criterion_entry_ban_met
criterion_entry_ban_met.description: The absconding criterion based on entry ban is met: the foreigner is subject to an entry ban in the Kingdom and/or another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

submitted_new_application_after_negative.name: submitted_new_application_after_negative_decision
submitted_new_application_after_negative.description: The foreigner submitted a new residence or international protection application immediately after a decision refusing entry or residence, ending residence, or ordering refoulement or removal.

criterion_new_application_after_decision.name: criterion_new_application_after_decision_met
criterion_new_application_after_decision.description: The absconding criterion based on new application after decision is met: the foreigner submitted a new application immediately after a negative decision.

concealed_fingerprints_in_other_dublin_s.name: concealed_fingerprints_in_other_dublin_state
concealed_fingerprints_in_other_dublin_s.description: The foreigner, when questioned, concealed that they had already provided fingerprints in another State bound by European regulations on determining the responsible State for international protection applications.

criterion_concealment_of_fingerprints_me.name: criterion_concealment_of_fingerprints_met
criterion_concealment_of_fingerprints_me.description: The absconding criterion based on concealment of fingerprints is met: the foreigner concealed having provided fingerprints in another Dublin-bound State.

submitted_multiple_applications_with_neg.name: submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome
submitted_multiple_applications_with_neg.description: The foreigner submitted multiple applications for international protection and/or residence in the Kingdom or other Member States, resulting in negative decisions or no residence permit.

criterion_multiple_applications_met.name: criterion_multiple_applications_met
criterion_multiple_applications_met.description: The absconding criterion based on multiple applications is met: the foreigner submitted multiple applications resulting in negative decisions or no residence permit.

concealed_prior_application_in_other_dub.name: concealed_prior_application_in_other_dublin_state
concealed_prior_application_in_other_dub.description: The foreigner, when questioned, concealed that they had previously submitted an application for international protection in another State bound by European regulations on determining the responsible State.

criterion_concealment_of_prior_applicati.name: criterion_concealment_of_prior_application_met
criterion_concealment_of_prior_applicati.description: The absconding criterion based on concealment of prior application is met: the foreigner concealed having previously submitted an international protection application in another Dublin-bound State.

declared_or_file_shows_purpose_other_tha.name: declared_or_file_shows_purpose_other_than_application
declared_or_file_shows_purpose_other_tha.description: The foreigner has declared, or it appears from their file, that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an application for international protection or a residence application.

criterion_declared_purpose_met.name: criterion_declared_purpose_met
criterion_declared_purpose_met.description: The absconding criterion based on declared purpose is met: the foreigner came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those stated in their application.

subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_.name: subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_.description: The foreigner is subject to a fine because they submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

criterion_manifestly_unfounded_appeal_me.name: criterion_manifestly_unfounded_appeal_met
criterion_manifestly_unfounded_appeal_me.description: The absconding criterion based on manifestly unfounded appeal is met: the foreigner is subject to a fine for submitting a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met.name: at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met
at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met.description: At least one of the objective absconding criteria is met for the foreigner.

subject_to_relevant_procedure.name: subject_to_relevant_procedure
subject_to_relevant_procedure.description: The foreigner is subject to a removal procedure, an international protection procedure, or a Dublin transfer procedure.
